# UC-14.10.11 · Aranet Weekly Occupancy Pattern from CO2 Peaks

## Description

CO2 daily peaks trace occupancy rhythms; useful for cleaning schedules and hybrid desk planning.

## Value

Reduces energy and cleaning spend aligned to real use.

## Implementation

(1) Exclude outdoor transfer grilles. (2) Share anonymized dashboards with workplace team.

## SPL

```spl
index=environment sourcetype="aranet:sensor" earliest=-30d
| eval co2=tonumber(coalesce(co2_ppm, ""))
| eval dow=strftime(_time,"%w")
| bin _time span=1d
| stats max(co2) as daily_peak by _time location
| stats avg(daily_peak) as typical_peak by location dow
```

## Visualization

Heatmap dow × hour; line typical peak.

## References

- [Aranet — environmental monitoring](https://aranet.com/)
- [ASHRAE — IAQ](https://www.ashrae.org/)
- [OSHA indoor air](https://www.osha.gov/indoor-air-quality)
